titleStmt.title: SII 31.20: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 20. (A.R. No. B 204 of 1936.) AGNIGUṆḌĀLA, VINUKONDA TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: A slab lying in survey No. 83 to the south of the village.
This is dated Śaka 1093, Khara, Māgha, śu. 15, Wednesday, lunar eclipse corresponding to January 12, 1172 A.D.

Damaged and incomplete. It records the gift (details not available) for maintaining the offerings and worship (havi-bali-archana) to the god Śrī Parvataśikhara simhāsana śikhaēśvara i.e. Mallikārjuna of Śrīśailam by the king Rājēndra Chōḍa, the son of mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kulōttuṅga Chōḍa Gonkarāja of Velanānṭi Chōḍa family. The gift (not specified) is stated to have been entrusted to certain dēvara for its maintenance.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata paṁcamahā
śabda mahāmaṁḍalēśvara vīralakṣmiśva
ra cāḷukya rājya bhuvana mūlastaṁbha
jriṁbhita ripumadastaṁbha caturtta
kula vanaja vanamārttaṁḍa calamattu gaṁḍa triśa
tōttara ṣaṭsahasrāvanīnādha saṁghaṭitabudha
manōradha sahakāravallabha bhayalōbhadurlla
bha raṇaraṁgarākṣasa niratiśayaguṇa samara
rasa bhīma bhuvanābhirāma dāyaga
ja kēsari ghaṭita ratnaraśmigaṇanārha śivapāda śēkhara
satyaratnākara nāmādi samastapraśasti sahitaṁ śrīma
nmahāmaṁḍalēśvara kulōttuṁga velanāṁṭi cōḍagoṁka
rāju puttruṁḍaina rājēṁdracōḍa rājulu mahivarddha
sakalyaṇa vijayarā jya varttyakamuna ṣa(sa)kava
ruṣaṁbulu 1093 gunēṁṭi khara saṁhavatsa
ra māgha papurna māsyayu budhavāramunē sō
magrahaṇa nimityamuna śrīparvvataśikhara siṁhā
sana śikharēśvara śrīmahādēvaraku
havi bali Arca nala ṭapu
vīniṁjēkōni sa
nnadēvara sakra

maṁbu naḍapaṁgalavāru dīnike
varainanu viṣnumusēyaṁ dalaṁ
cina vāru paṁca
mahapātakamu sēsina vāru
bhaṁḍāri
rāma
Digital edition of SII 31.20 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
